---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

### [Personal Website](projects/personal-website.qmd)
This site—home base for projects, blog, and publications. Quarto, custom styling, GitHub Pages.

### [Magic: The Gathering cards](projects/mtg-cards.qmd)
Placeholder: tracking or playing with MTG card data. (No external links yet.)

### [Legos](projects/legos.qmd)
Placeholder: cataloging sets, builds, or something else Lego-related. (No external links yet.)

### [Cooking](projects/cooking.qmd)
Placeholder: recipes, meal planning, or cooking notes. (No external links yet.)
